name: promptgenie
description: Inline lint and security scan for AI prompt files — powered by the PromptGenie CLI.

promptgenie.executablePath.markdownDescription:
Absolute path to the `promptgenie` CLI executable. Defaults to `promptgenie` (resolved from `PATH`). If you installed PromptGenie in a virtualenv, set this to the full absolute path, e.g. `/home/user/.venv/bin/promptgenie`.

**Security notice:** This setting executes the specified binary with the privileges of your VS Code process. **Never** point this at an untrusted executable — a malicious workspace `.vscode/settings.json` that overrides this value could execute arbitrary code. Because `scope` is `machine`, workspace-level settings cannot override this value; it must be set in your user or machine settings.

promptgenie.cliPath.markdownDescription:
**Deprecated** — use `promptgenie.executablePath` instead. Absolute path to the `promptgenie` CLI executable.

**Security notice:** This setting executes the specified binary. Only set this to a path you fully trust. Workspace-level settings cannot override this value (`scope: machine`).

promptgenie.target.description: Default --target profile passed to generate and adapt (e.g. 'claude-code', 'cursor', 'gpt-4o'). Leave empty to omit the flag.

promptgenie.config.description: Path to a .promptgenie.yaml config file. Leave empty to use auto-discovery.

promptgenie.runOnSave.description: Run lint and scan automatically when a prompt file is saved.

promptgenie.runOnChange.description: Run lint automatically while typing (debounced). Scan only runs on save.

promptgenie.debounceMs.description: Milliseconds to debounce lint-on-change. Lower values give faster feedback; higher values reduce CPU usage.

promptgenie.enabledFileExtensions.description: File extensions that activate PromptGenie diagnostics.

promptgenie.showScoreInStatusBar.description: Show the prompt quality score in the status bar for active prompt files.

promptgenie.severityMapping.description: Map PromptGenie severity/risk levels to VS Code diagnostic severity. Values: 'error', 'warning', 'information', 'hint'.
